query:
ALTER TABLE invoices MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('generada','enviada','cobrada','anulada','abonada') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'generada';

ALTER TABLE reservations
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceNumber VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod ENUM('redsys','transferencia','efectivo','otro') DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedBy INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedAt BIGINT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS channel ENUM('web','crm','telefono','email','otro') DEFAULT 'web';

ALTER TABLE reservations
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceNumber VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod ENUM('redsys','transferencia','efectivo','otro') DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedBy INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedAt BIGINT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS channel ENUM('web','crm','telefono','email','otro') DEFAULT 'web';
